student_description: Unique synthetic identifier for each loan application.
notes: Do not use as a meaningful applicant characteristic.

student_description: Date associated with the credit decision or application record.
notes: Imported from more than one legacy source; formats may not be fully standardized.

student_description: Historical indication of whether the applicant had a previous default event.
notes: Legacy encodings are not fully standardized.

student_description: Applicant age at the time of the credit decision, when available.
Applicant year of birth, when available.
Synthetic demographic group code.
notes: Synthetic group code is used because demographic variables may be subject to legal and regulatory limitations for fairness and discrimination-related issues.

student_description: Synthetic demographic group code.
notes: Synthetic group code is used because demographic variables may be subject to legal and regulatory limitations for fairness and discrimination-related issues.

student_description: External provider's estimated default-risk score, when available.
FICO-like credit score when available.
Vantage-like credit score when available.
SCHUFA-like credit score when available.
Highest reported education level, coded from 1 to 5.
notes: Higher values represent higher reported education levels.

student_description: Structured employment category derived from the applicant's job profile.
notes: Values describe broad employment stability and job profile groups.

student_description: Reported annual income.
notes: Imported from more than one legacy source.

student_description: Reported additional income beyond main annual income.
notes: Imported from more than one legacy source.

student_description: Applicant civil or household status.
Number of reported dependent children.
Short qualitative note written during the credit review process.
notes: Free-text field. May contain useful underwriting information.

student_description: Loan amount requested by the applicant.
Indicator of whether the applicant belongs to a special relationship segment.
notes: It may affect the credit decision process in some cases.

student_description: Risk indicator from an aggregator source.
